title: Benzoxaborole compounds
abstract: The present invention relates to the use of the compounds of formula (I) wherein the variables are defined according to the description, for controlling unwanted vegetation Further the invention relates to novel compounds of the formula (I),, compositions comprising them a method for controlling unwanted vegetation which comprises allowing a herbicidal effective amount of at least one azine of the formula I to act on plants, their seed and/or their habitat.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A use of compounds of formula (I) is O, NR 7 or S, SO, S0 2 ; is Ci-C6-alkyl, C 3 -C6-alkenyl, C 3 -C6-alkynyl where the radicals are unsubstituted or substituted by 1 , 2, 3, 4 or 5 identical or different substituents selected from the group consisting of halogen, Ci-C6-alkyl, Ci-C6-haloalkyl, Ci- C6-alkoxy, Ci-C6-haloalkoxy, C(=0)0(Ci-C6-alkyl) and phenyl which is unsubstituted or substituted by halogen, Ci-C6-alkyl, Ci-C6-haloalkyl; is selected from the group consisting of H and Ci-C6-alkyl; is selected from the group consisting of H and Ci-C6-alkyl; is selected from the group consisting of H, halogen, OH, CN, amino, NO2, Ci-C6-alkyl, C3-C6-alkenyl, C3-C6-alkynyl, Ci-C6-alkoxy, C2-C6-alkenyloxy, C2-C6-alkynyloxy, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-CrC6-alkyl, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-CrC6-alkoxy, (Ci- C6-alkoxy)-C3-C6-alkenyl, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-C3-C6-alkynyl, where the aliphatic parts of the aforementioned radicals are unsubstituted, partly or completely halogenated; is selected from the group consisting of H, halogen, OH, CN , amino, NO2, Ci- C6-alkyl, C3-C6-alkenyl, C3-C6-alkynyl, Ci-C6-alkoxy, C2-C6-alkenyloxy, C2-C6- alkynyloxy, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-Ci-C6-alkyl, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-Ci-C6-alkoxy, (C1-C6- alkoxy)-C 3 -C6-alkenyl, (CrC 6 -alkoxy)-C 3 -C6-alkynyl, where the aliphatic parts of the aforementioned radicals are unsubstituted, partly or completely halogenated; is selected from the group consisting of H, halogen, OH, CN , amino, NO2, Ci- C6-alkyl, C3-C6-alkenyl, C3-C6-alkynyl, Ci-C6-alkoxy, C2-C6-alkenyloxy, C2-C6- alkynyloxy, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-Ci-C6-alkyl, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-Ci-C6-alkoxy, (C1-C6- alkoxy)-C3-C6-alkenyl, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-C3-C6-alkynyl, where the aliphatic parts of the aforementioned radicals are unsubstituted, partly or completely halogenated; 

 R 6 is selected from the group consisting of H, Ci-C6-alkyl, C3-C6-alkenyl, C3-C6- alkynyl, (Ci-C 6 -alkoxy)-Ci-C 6 -alkyl, (Ci-C6-alkoxy)-C 3 -C 6 -alkenyl, (Ci-C 6 - alkoxy)-C3-C6-alkynyl, phenyl, phenyl-Ci-C6-alkyl, where the aliphatic and phenyl parts of the aforementioned radicals are unsubstituted, partly or completely halogenated; R 7 is selected from the group consisting of H, Ci-C6-alkyl, C3-C6-alkenyl, C3-C6- alkynyl; including their agriculturally acceptable salts for controlling unwanted vegetation. 2. Use according to claim 1 , wherein X is O. 3. Use according to any of claims 1 or 2, wherein Y is Ci-C6-alkyl which is unsubstituted. 4. Use according to any to any of preceding claims, wherein Y is -CH2-. 5. Use according to any of claims 1 or 2, wherein Y is Ci-C6-alkyl which is substituted by 1 or 2 identical or different substituents selected from the group consisting of Ci-C6-alkyl, Ci- Ce-alkoxy, C(=0)0(Ci-C 6 -alkyl) and phenyl. 6. Use according to claim 5, wherein Y is -CH 2 - which is substituted by 1 or 2 identical or different substituents selected from the group consisting of CH 3 , CH 2 CH 3 , C(=0)(OCH 3 ), OCh and unsubstituted phenyl. 7. Use according to any of preceding claims, wherein R 1 and R 2 are independently selected from the group consisting of H and Ci-C4-alkyl, in particular are both H. 8. Use according to any of preceding claims, wherein R 3 is selected from the group consisting of H, halogen, Ci-C6-alkyl and Ci-C6-haloalkyl, in particular H. 9. Use according to any of preceding claims, wherein R 4 is selected from the group consisting of H, halogen, Ci-C6-alkyl and Ci-C6-haloalkyl, in particular H, CI and F. 10. Use according to any of preceding claims, wherein R 5 is selected from the group consisting of H, halogen, Ci-C6-alkyl and Ci-C6-haloalkyl, in particular H, CI and F. 1 1. Use according to any of preceding claims, wherein R 6 is selected from the group consisting of H and Ci-C6-alkyl, in particular H, CH3 and CH2CH3. 12. Use according to any of preceding claims, wherein R 6 is H and R 4 is selected from the group consisting of halogen, Ci-C6-alkyl and Ci-C6-haloalkyl, in particular CI and F. 13. The compounds of the formula (I) as defined in claim 1 with the proviso that if R 1 and R 2 are H R 4 is not H, CI and F; and R 4 is not H. An agrochemical composition comprising a herbicidal active amount of at least one compound as claimed in any of claims 1 to 100 and at least one inert liquid and/or solid carrier and, if appropriate, at least one surface-active substances. A method for controlling unwanted vegetation which comprises allowing a herbicidally effective amount of at least one compound of the formula I or of an agriculturally suitable salt or N-oxide thereof as defined in any of claims 1 to 13 to act on plants, their seed and/or their habitat.
